items.title: Visualizing the Loss Landscape of Neural Nets (Li et al.)
items.author: Hao Li et al.
items.note: Influential work on filtering and visualizing 2D loss landscape slices for neural networks.

items.title: Stanford CS229 — Convex Optimization (course notes)
items.author: Stanford CS229 Staff
items.note: Convex vs non-convex objectives and geometric intuition for multivariate loss minimization.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville) — Optimization chapter
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Textbook treatment of cost functions, critical points, and challenges in non-convex neural network training.
